since_last: 28% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.13%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 28% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC +0.51% · Gold +0.94% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 28% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.13%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.13%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.01%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -14.01%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +6.07%, ZS +2.26%, CSCO +2.23%, OKTA +2.10%, FTNT +2.00%. Laggards: ISRG -14.01%, CRNC -6.94%, PUBM -6.60%, AMAT -6.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.42% at $124.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.42% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
